author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Episode 4 of Star Atlas CORE is Out Now!

With MUD investigators and Followers of the Light hot on their trail, Gyun and Moda must start thinking if this journey is worth risking their lives!

Collectible Covers  
Each episode of CORE has exclusive collectible covers available at Magic Eden and our Galactic Marketplace!

If you missed out on past covers, don't worry, you can find them here on our Galactic Marketplace: https://play.staratlas.com/market/?category=story&itemClass=graphic-novel

 | Episode 4 Star Atlas Collectible Cover: https://play.staratlas.com/market/E19H2D3q93q8Wp1MQ22LdYB4jD5DJMRdF6dKRVUg4Z1y/
 | Episode 4 Magic Eden Collectible Cover: https://magiceden.io/launchpad/star_atlas_episode_4
